mapper.insert:
SELECT MAX(BOARD_NO) FROM UNKNOWN_BOARD
INSERT INTO UNKNOWN_BOARD ( BOARD_NO , REF_USER , BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT , CREATE_DATE , PASSWORD , VIEWS ) VALUES ( SEQ_UB.NEXTVAL , #{refUser} , #{boardTitle} , #{boardContent} , SYSTIMESTAMP , #{password} , 0 )
mapper.sql: SELECT B.BOARD_NO , B.REF_USER , B.BOARD_TITLE , B.BOARD_CONTENT , B.CREATE_DATE , B.PASSWORD , B.VIEWS , COUNT(L.REF_BNO) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM UNKNOWN_BOARD B LEFT JOIN LIKES L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.REF_BNO
mapper.select: WHERE STATUS = 'Y' GROUP BY B.BOARD_NO, B.REF_USER, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.CREATE_DATE, B.PASSWORD, B.VIEWS ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
GROUP BY B.BOARD_NO, B.REF_USER, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.CREATE_DATE, B.PASSWORD, B.VIEWS ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE UNKNOWN_BOARD SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND PASSWORD = #{password} AND STATUS = 'Y'
UPDATE UNKNOWN_BOARD SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y' GROUP BY B.BOARD_NO, B.REF_USER, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.CREATE_DATE, B.PASSWORD, B.VIEWS
mapper.update: UPDATE UNKNOWN_BOARD SET VIEWS = VIEWS + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
